cards.back: A deployment strategy where the application remains available and functional during the deployment process
A deployment strategy where a small subset of users are introduced to a new deployment before it's rolled out to the entire user base
A deployment strategy where two identical environments are used, one for production and one for the new deployment, allowing for a seamless switch
A deployment strategy where updates are rolled out incrementally, one component at a time, to minimize downtime
A deployment strategy where two versions of the application are deployed, one with the new changes and one without, to test their effectiveness
